name: MariaDB
short_description: Fast, open-source MySQL-compatible database with enhanced features and better performance.
description: MariaDB is an open-source, MySQL-compatible relational database server. It supports multiple storage engines, JSON and GIS features, and offers improved performance and additional features used by apps like WordPress and Nextcloud—serving as a drop-in MySQL replacement.
usecases: Run the database backend for Nextcloud, WordPress, or other PHP applications.
Store application data for your custom projects with full SQL capabilities.
Use as a drop-in replacement for MySQL in existing applications.
Build analytics databases with ColumnStore for real-time aggregations.
notes: MySQL-compatible - most MySQL clients and tools work directly
Set MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD environment variable for root access
Data persists in the mariadb_data volume
